## Test plan

- [ ] `bash tests/run-fixtures.sh` exits 0
- [ ] `bash tests/lib/validate-frontmatter.sh skills/` exits 0
- [ ] No em dashes (`—`), en dashes (`–`), or `--` introduced as casual punctuation
- [ ] If adding a profile: fixture, `expected.json`, and harness case all in place
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry under `## [Unreleased]` (or `## [X.Y.Z]` for releases)
- [ ] Manual smoke against a real repo, if changes touch the orchestrator or aggregator
